monday.description: Pan-seared Yellowfin Tuna served with Teriyaki Sauce-infused Orecchiette and sautéed Portobello Mushrooms.

tuesday.description: Smoked Lomo Iberico wrapped in Gluten-free Dosa with sautéed Drumstick Pods and a hint of Manufacturing Cream.

wednesday.description: Fresh Turbot pan-seared and served with crispy Bhatura, Organic Kale, and a drizzle of Reduced-sodium Hoisin Sauce.

thursday.description: Corned Beef slow-cooked with Organic Globe Artichokes and served over Forbidden Rice, finished with Full-fat Coffee Yogurt.

friday.description: Smoked Culatello sautéed with Dried Bunashimeji Mushrooms and Mung Bean Vermicelli, tossed in Cold-pressed Canola Oil.

monday.description: Grated Roquefort mixed with Wide Rice Noodles, Soybean Sprouts, and a sprinkle of Ground Urfa Biber.

tuesday.description: Sliced Cotija served with Gluten-free Country Loaf, Organic Plum Tomatoes, and a drizzle of Teriyaki Sauce.

wednesday.description: Reblochon melted over Whole Grain Couscous, Organic Nori Sheets, and a dollop of Horseradish.

thursday.description: Organic Three-grain Tempeh stir-fried with Gluten-free Cheese Ravioli, Hijiki, and a sprinkle of Ground Crushed Red Pepper.

friday.description: Sliced Robiola served on Crispbread with Cucumbers and a drizzle of Flaxseed Oil.
